system.notes:
Abilities

  • Voltshot: The shield sec injects themselves with a combat drug cocktail. At the start of the next Combat Turn, the shield sec gains +3 to all attack tests, and their Initiative is 2d6+4. In 20 minutes, these effects end, and the shield sec takes 5S unresisted damage.

Traits

  • Vision Enhancements: Flare Compensation, Low-
  • Light, Thermographic, Vision Magnification:
  • Mash the Trigger: The shield sec does not suffer
  • recoil penalties.:
